programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: When the telegraph made its debut, Pony Express riders like John Blair and his buddy Smoky lost their jobs. The government mail contract is up for grabs, and a race will determine if they or Drake, the owner of the Stageline, will win it. AKA Stagecoach Run

programme.title: Luna: Spirit of the Whale
programme.desc: When a single Orca is seen near Vancouver Island, it’s clear it got separated from its pod and is in the wrong spot. Ted Jeffries and his team at the Department of Fisheries & Oceans (DFO) want to catch Luna and bring him back to his family. But, the local folks think it should be up to Luna to decide where to stay.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E.
programme.desc: After losing her parents in a car accident, 15-year-old Isabel Sullivan moves to a small town to live with her Uncle Paul. She makes friends with a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. He looks like a regular dog but he can talk, run super fast, has x-ray vision, and is really strong. They become close friends, but then a bad guy shows up in town saying he owns A.R.C.H.I.E.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E. 2 : Mission Impawsible
programme.desc: In this sequel, the super intelligent artificial robotronic dog, Archie, befriends Gregory, a young boy who is the son of a carnival owner. Gregory is concerned that someone has been stealing from the carnival and enlists his new friend to help find the culprit.

programme.title: Somewhere in Time
programme.desc: A Chicago playwright uses self-hypnosis to journey back in time and meet the actress whose old portrait hangs in an elegant hotel.

programme.title: Camille
programme.desc: Camille is a courtesan living in Paris, and she falls head over heels for a promising young guy named Armand Duval. Armand's dad, worried about his son's future, asks Camille not to marry Armand so he can focus on his career and social status. Camille agrees and breaks up with Armand, even though it's tough for her. But later, when she's struggling with money and gets really sick, she finds out that Armand still loves her.

programme.title: The Trouble With Spies
programme.desc: British spy George Trent goes missing in Ibiza. Appleton Porter heads over to look into it, chatting with folks staying at the hotel who were Trent's neighbors. Trent dodges a few murder attempts as he figures out what's going on.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A celebrated military contractor returns to the site of his greatest career triumphs and reconnects with a long-ago love, while unexpectedly falling for the hard-charging Air Force watchdog assigned to him.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Hopeless dweeb Elliot Richards is granted seven wishes by the Devil to snare Allison, the girl of his dreams, in exchange for his soul.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A successful lawyer's husband is arrested for murdering nine villagers in El Salvador in 1988, as a US soldier under a different name. She decides to defend him in military court and find out the truth about what happened.

programme.title: 12 Feet Deep
programme.desc: Two sisters are trapped under the fiberglass cover of an Olympic sized public pool and must brave the cold and each other to survive the harrowing night.

programme.title: One Of Our Aircraft Is Missing
